notes: v0.2.10: Distortion rewrite. Drive now controls CLIPPING CHARACTER, not volume — turning drive up no longer just makes things louder, it makes them more distorted. Added 1-pole cabinet simulation (~4.5 kHz lowpass) for warm guitar-amp character instead of harsh digital fizz. Output level is normalized independent of drive. Asymmetric tanh saturation adds even + odd harmonics. Much closer to Hardcore VST / real guitar amp feel.
